description: A JavaScript widget mount point that dynamically renders undergraduate course fee information based on the course internal code and start year.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Fee lookup widget for a 2026 entry course

stories.name: Year2027
stories.description: Fee lookup widget for a 2027 entry course

notes: This is a JavaScript widget mount point — the div is rendered empty in the HTML and populated at runtime by a JS script that reads the data attributes. The component renders only the empty div shell with the required data attributes.
